hooks.command: PY=${PYTHON_CMD:-C:/Project/데모/doc-auto-mvp/.venv-ai/Scripts/python.exe}; RUFF=${RUFF_CMD:-C:/Project/데모/doc-auto-mvp/.venv-ai/Scripts/ruff.exe}; FILE=$($PY -c "import json, os; print(json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('file_path',''))"); [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && { if [ -x "$RUFF" ]; then "$RUFF" check "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -15; else $PY -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1; fi; } || true

PY=${PYTHON_CMD:-C:/Project/데모/doc-auto-mvp/.venv-ai/Scripts/python.exe}; CMD=$($PY -c "import json, os; print(json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('command',''))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if [ "$SKIP_PRECOMMIT_TESTS" = "1" ]; then echo 'SKIP_PRECOMMIT_TESTS=1, skipping tests'; exit 0; fi; $PY -m pytest tests/ -x -q --no-header 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
